description_long: A stack of three golden-brown pancakes sits neatly on a pale, round plate. The pancakes are thick and fluffy, with slightly uneven, natural edges that suggest a homemade quality. Atop the stack is a small, square pat of butter, beginning to melt into the warm surface of the uppermost pancake. The pancakes have a soft, matte finish, with subtle shading indicating their pillowy texture. The plate is simple and unobtrusive, providing a gentle contrast to the warm tones of the pancakes. No syrup or additional garnishes are visible, making the butter the sole topping.
description: A stack of three fluffy, golden-brown pancakes with a pat of butter on top, served on a pale plate. The pancakes appear soft and thick, with no visible syrup or garnish.
description_view_0: Three stacked pancakes with a pat of butter on top, viewed from a slight angle showing the left side and the plate's edge.
description_view_1: Front view of the pancake stack, clearly displaying the butter pat and the even layering of the pancakes.
description_view_2: Right-side view of the pancakes, highlighting the thickness and soft edges of the stack.
description_view_3: Rear view of the stack, with the butter pat still visible and the plate's round shape more pronounced.
